CustomField.description: DML execution precedence value. Lower values execute first. Example: Account=10, Contact=20 means Account DML executes before Contact when no explicit relate() relationship exists.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Execution order precedence (lower = earlier). Recommended ranges: 10-100 for parent objects, 100-500 for child objects, 500+ for junction/audit objects.
CustomField.label: Precedence
